name: Grandmother Merrill's Chili Sauce MM
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop onions and peppers.
2. Mix the chopped onions and peppers with sugar, vinegar, and salt.
3. Cook slowly until the onions are tender.
4. Chop tomatoes and add them to the mixture.
5. Add allspice and cinnamon; stir well.
6. Cook for 3 minutes.
7. This makes 4 cups of sauce. It is good on dried peas or beans, boiled cabbage, etc.
